description: A dealership reports that a new vehicle has arrived from the factory with a dent, which occurred during transport.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the VIN of the damaged vehicle and photos of the damage from the dealership.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the VIN and images of the dented fender.

nodes.task_description: Log a damage claim against the shipping carrier responsible for the transport.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully files a claim with the carrier, including the evidence.

nodes.task_description: Authorize the dealership to perform the repair and issue a credit to cover the cost.

expected_outcome.value: Agent authorizes the repair and processes a credit to the dealership's account.
